choices: All of the women around you begin looking a little more... furry
Did your teacher's boobs always look that big? There seems to be a trend here...
There suddenly seems to be a lot more women than men
1.content: To kick things off let's decide what kind of weird and wacky changes we will encounter first.
1.title: The start...

choices: People start to be sexually open with each other & give frenchies to say hello
Half of the world's population becomes smarter, the other half more attractive
A race of female aliens arrive and begin abducting men to be breeding slaves
portals start spontaneously opening leading to different fictional dimensions
15.title: More options

info.description:
You are a perfectly normal human being who lives in a perfectly normal town. You go to a perfectly normal school with perfectly normal friends and neighbors, and a perfectly normal family.
Life is more or less good for you, and you're pretty happy with the life you have and wouldn't have it any other way.

.. but when strange things start happening and the world starts changing around you for no reason, and nobody seems to care or notice, will you be able to face what happens?

Rules: You can change anything in the world you want, any way you want. Yes, really. It could be something that affects the entire planet at once or it could be something very subtle, the choice is yours.

Limit one change per chapter, there is a cooldown period for it, you know. That doesn't mean spamming my inbox with one sentence choice chapters either. (You know who you are.)

A chapter must be at least one paragraph (six to seven sentences)

The protagonist can not be killed or maimed, subjected to psychological or physical torture, or any fetishes that I find demeaning or disgusting (being used as a toilet slave for example.) Everything else is fair game.

Please add if you wish and enjoy the story!
